relationships: kab:Ur nezmir ara ad nkemmel ma ulac Tom
kab:Tom yella yeḥulfa iman-is weḥd-s makken ulac Mary
kab:Qrib ulac akk tiqcicin yetturaren uraren uvidyu
kab:Yessefcal ticki ulac dacu ara txedmeḍ
kab:Yezmer yiwen seg-wen ad d-yeldi tawwurt, ma ulac aɣilif﹖
kab:Ur tezmireḍ ara ad txedmeḍ d yiwen ma ulac lemqadra gar-awen
kab:Tzemreḍ ad tgeḍ ayenni anda nniḍen, ma ulac aɣilif﹖
kab:Ur iyi-ttaǧǧa ara ad d-skecmeɣ iman-iw, ma ulac aɣilif
kab:Sarameɣ ulac win i k-yeẓran mi txedmeḍ ayay
kab:Sarameɣ ulac win i kem-yeẓran mi txedmeḍ ayay
